data.body:
AC amendment: Early tag uniqueness check required
- Before any mutations, check that git tag v<VERSION> does not exist locally or on origin (git tag -l v<VERSION>; git ls-remote --tags origin v<VERSION>)
- Must exit non-zero early with named error 'ERROR: Tag v<VERSION> already exists — aborting release'
Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh (includes test_release_tag_already_exists)
